shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
My favorite season is autumn because of the colors.
I often go hiking during the weekends with friends.
Cooking new recipes is a fun challenge for me.
I believe learning a new language opens many doors.
Traveling to different countries broadens our perspectives.
I like to listen to music while studying for exams.
Finding a balance between work and life can be difficult.
Participating in community service helps strengthen local ties.
I think trying new activities can improve our confidence.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about family gatherings.
questions: Q1: Can you describe a memorable family gathering you attended?
Q2: What challenges do families face when organizing these events?
Q3: In your opinion, how important are family gatherings for maintaining relationships?
Q4: What advice would you give families to make their gatherings more enjoyable?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about workplace health.
questions: Q1: What are some healthy habits you practice at work?
Q2: What challenges do employees face in maintaining their health at work?
Q3: How do you feel about the importance of health programs in the workplace?
Q4: What recommendations would you give to improve health awareness at work?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about eco-friendly living.
questions: Q1: Can you share your experience with adopting eco-friendly habits?
Q2: What are some challenges people face when trying to live sustainably?
Q3: What is your opinion on the effectiveness of individual actions for the environment?
Q4: What tips would you give someone wanting to start an eco-friendly lifestyle?
